fields.description: Analyst-initiated account takeover (ATO) identity containment: validate the target user in Azure AD, gate on analyst approval, then revoke Azure AD sign-in sessions, reset the on-prem Active Directory password (synced to Azure AD and Google Workspace), and suspend/re-enable the Google Workspace account to invalidate Google sessions. Finishes with a documentation/handoff task.
fields.name: Account Takeover - Identity Containment

.user-choice-icon.data-tooltip: Confirm identity containment for {{params.user_upn}}? This will revoke Azure AD sessions, reset the on-prem AD password, and suspend/re-enable the Google Workspace account.

nodes.question: Confirm identity containment for {{params.user_upn}}? This will revoke Azure AD sessions, reset the on-prem AD password, and suspend/re-enable the Google Workspace account.

nodes.desc: Record containment completed for {{params.user_upn}}: Azure AD sessions revoked, on-prem AD password reset (synced to Azure AD and Google Workspace), Google sessions invalidated via suspend/enable. Coordinate secure credential handoff with the user and notify their manager and the IT helpdesk.
nodes.title: Document Containment Completion
